# Updated 2026-04-25: removed ace_ets_module_menu_static — the selector
# does not discover this suite from menu_item_pattern.cpp because the path
# hints don't match the dialog/menu project path.
#
# menu_item_pattern.cpp is the C++ implementation of MenuItem component.
# ace_ets_module_modifier_static: imports MenuItem, MenuItemModifier (menu.ets)
